title: BoardAppointment
description: An appointment made by the Manhattan Borough President to a board, commission, or community body — community boards, HHC Community Advisory Boards, Community Education Councils, and other civic bodies. Canonical schema reconciling the 'BP Appointments' dataset (nr9n-yqxr, 3 columns): appointee, board category, and appointing/host organization.

boardCategory.description: Category of board the person is appointed to ('Board Category'), e.g. Community Board, CEC, HHC CAB.

organization.description: Board / organization the appointee serves on ('Organization').
